stories.title: Microsoft 365 Copilot becomes a permanent paid plan on 1 July, with a renewal window closing 30 June
stories.summary: Microsoft confirmed that the Copilot add-ons for Microsoft 365 Business Standard and Business Premium become permanent paid plans on 1 July, with the standalone Copilot Business add-on moving to a higher list price at the same time. Customers who renew before 1 July can hold current pricing until their next renewal. Check when your contract renews and what you actually pay for Copilot, and decide before the deadline rather than letting it roll over.
